changes: Fix dev tunnel re-authentication in the installed PWA opening an empty file instead of the sign-in page
Hide experimental commands from the CLI help output until they are enabled
Relicense climon under the MIT License
Add the `climon license` command to print the MIT License and bundled third-party notices
Distribute releases from the jackgeek/climon repository; auto-update keeps working for existing installs
Show a one-time notice on the first launch after upgrading from a pre-open-source build
Hide the dashboard Remote hosts menu item when feature.remotes is disabled
View connected remote hosts live from the new dashboard Remote hosts menu and panel
List remote hosts and their connection status with the new `climon remotes` command
Gate remote access and the WSL bridge behind the new feature.remotes and feature.wslBridge config flags
Replace the --enable-remotes flag with the feature.remotes config setting
Prompt to enable the WSL bridge when linking same-machine peers with climon link
Redact sensitive values in 'climon config list' and 'climon config get' output
Read security-sensitive settings from global config only and warn on local overrides
Harden the dashboard server against SSRF, DNS-rebinding, and cross-site WebSocket hijacking
Clean up ghost remote sessions and fix an ingest reconnect deadlock
Fix configured remote hosts never connecting because the dashboard ingest did not host its dev tunnel
Stop console windows from flashing for Windows child processes
Move the mobile Open terminal button above the status and client details
Choose a per-session terminal theme with the new --theme flag and the dashboard Edit/New session dialogs
Pick from the full set of bundled terminal themes in a searchable, light/dark-grouped theme picker
Set a default dashboard theme that sessions inherit live until overridden
Sync dashboard preferences (theme and key-bar pin) across your connected clients
Pin the dashboard key bar on mobile via the hamburger menu
Show an in-app sign-in prompt when a dev tunnel session expires, instead of a dead connection
Show a countdown banner before a dashboard tunnel link expires
Open the originating session terminal when you tap a push notification
Stop console windows from flashing on Windows when the remote uplink retries
Spawn new sessions directly from the dashboard, including headless and visible terminal-window sessions
Route session spawns to remote devboxes over a signed, replay-protected channel
Add a configurable hotkey (default Alt+J) to focus the top session
Add a session.terminalProgram setting to choose the terminal for visible spawns
Fix Alt+Tab terminal corruption in the dashboard
Keep acknowledged sessions acknowledged when switching between them or on async resize redraws
Fix a PTY raw-mode echo race that leaked terminal query replies
Match keyboard shortcuts by physical key code so modifier-composed characters work
Query the real Windows console size for accurate terminal sizing
Report the live dashboard tunnel port and prune stale port mappings
Leave the default session name blank when no terminal title is available
Embed dashboard assets in the compiled server binary so the dashboard works standalone
Verify and decrypt signed releases during climon update using an embedded distribution password
Remove the "File a bug" link from the dashboard sidebar
Rewrote client entirely in Rust. Client now significantly more memory efficient.
Delay and reword the dashboard reconnect overlay so brief blips no longer flash a warning
Add `climon update`: verify Ed25519-signed releases and swap binaries atomically without killing running sessions
Check for new releases in the background and show an update-available banner
Add guided onboarding with opt-ins when installing on all platforms
Add a licence acceptance prompt on first run
Add opt-in anonymous telemetry
Add a feature-flag system in config.jsonc to gate experimental features such as session spawning
Add an installable mobile PWA dashboard with Web Push notifications for needs-attention sessions
Suppress and auto-acknowledge attention notifications for the session you are currently viewing
Use human-readable IDs for new sessions
Show a client ID badge on local sessions, defaulting to the hostname
Fix terminal corruption in browser viewers by delivering SIGWINCH to child processes and nested descendants on resize
Preserve and restore mouse tracking across dashboard reconnects and replays
Recover the terminal WebSocket and remote sessions after a server restart
Make unclamped (fill) sizing the default for new sessions
Fix Tunnel Link not restoring after a server restart
Restore the nested-session warning instead of blocking new sessions
Don't clear attention when a viewer resize reflows the screen
Restore attention acknowledgement when input is sent from the browser
Fix cross-OS server and ingest shutdown with newest-wins promote
Refine sidebar layout and active session item styling
Refresh terminal rendering when sessions are focused or shown on mobile
Fix Remotes dialog field clipping and menu labels
Remove dev tunnel connect-token setup in favor of identity access
Auto-discover remote tunnel ports for devbox clients
Add remote client ID configuration in the Remotes dialog
Prevent remote session duplicates and stale re-materialization
Improve tunnel and uplink reliability for remote sessions
Make cleanup verify and force-kill stale daemons before removing beacons
Add persistent server logs under CLIMON_HOME/logs/server
Fix shutdown signaling when peers or ingest are unavailable
Print startup message immediately when the server starts
Installer works on Linux and macOS (previously only Windows)
Displace locked binaries during install instead of failing
Suppress PowerShell CLIXML noise in installer error messages
Cleanup command reports which stale files it removed
Fall back to HTTP shutdown when server PID is unavailable
Remove server.json reliably on Ctrl+C (Windows)
Cross-OS promote gracefully shuts down the peer server via HTTP
Promote clears stale peer server.json when server is unreachable
Single-process session host — daemon merged into launcher for lower overhead
Replace compiled server/installer binaries with in-process JS bundles
Rename release artifacts to install(.exe), climon-alpha, climon-beta for clarity
Add mux keepalive ping/pong to prevent tunnel idle timeouts
Dual-listen ingest on loopback when tunnel is configured
Reconcile devtunnel port mapping when ingest binds to a different port
Fix ingest daemon startup verification and singleton conflict logging
Only start ingest daemon when --enable-remotes is set
Gate startup debug logs behind CLIMON_DEBUG=1
Force-close daemon sockets on PTY exit to prevent orphaned processes
Fix spurious re-renders when sessions are clicked in browser
Fix assorted UI bugs and TypeScript errors
Add changelog display and Linux installer
Bare `climon` command starts a monitored session for the current shell
Add macOS installer for darwin release zips
Cross-OS dashboard handoff between WSL and Windows
Add tunnelLink.keepAlive config setting
Revert PTY to host size when last browser viewer disconnects
Add CLIMON_DEBUG=1 logging for remote connections
Promote remote dev tunnel support to stable
Fix terminal mousewheel scrollback
Send page keys from terminal panel arrows
Avoid focusing xterm on terminal panel scroll
Recover when persisted tunnel is missing on port create
Auto-discover WSL/Windows dashboard via server.json beacon
Show redacted values in `config --debug`
Add scroll up/down chevrons to mobile terminal toolbar
Keep dev tunnel alive via periodic health pings
Reliable dev tunnel URL detection, health check, and self-heal
Mobile swipe panel with keyboard and font-size chooser
Landscape reveal swipe for mobile key bar
Mobile visual viewport fit and KeyBar refit
Fix atomic-write rename on transient Windows lock errors
Hide background child processes on Windows
Touch-swipe terminal scrolling on mobile
Persist and reuse dashboard tunnel metadata across restarts
Dashboard tunnel persistence for stable remote URLs
Authenticated tunnel link support
Notification toggle in sidebar menu
Collapsible session sidebar with persistent state
Per-session clamp lock icon with mobile auto-clamp
Auto color selection for new sessions
Browser terminal clamp toggle
Reject nested climon sessions
Animated session list reordering
Hide xterm scrollbar and forward wheel events to terminal
Rename 'available' status and harden attention idle handling
Per-session clamp lock icon visible on mobile
Add paused session status controls
Interactive config file purge command
Reclaim stale metadata locks on recovery
Windows setup installer (Setup.exe) in release zips
Fix terminal corruption when switching sessions
Gate remotes menu behind server flag
Dashboard attention alerts with audio notification
Show session status in header
PowerShell remote diagnostics
Polish dashboard terminal edge cases
Config stored as JSONC with generated settings registry
Generate config help from registry
Fix terminal size sent before replay
Fix web terminal focus and refit
Dashboard attention alerts with audio
Show session status in header
PowerShell remote diagnostics
Collapsible session sidebar with persistent state
Compact status badge labels
Attention acknowledgement (available status)
Auto session color selection
Browser terminal clamp toggle
Windows setup installer (Setup.exe) in release zips
Animated session list reordering
Prompt before replacing locked setup binaries
Kill all local sessions command
Direct Windows/WSL bridge
Preserve starting sessions during kill all
Use loopback TCP session sockets
Bulk kill command for local sessions
Dev tunnel remote clients with auto-create and manual setup
Remotes dialog in dashboard
Per-platform release zip packaging
Configurable detach prefix (default Ctrl-\)
Hierarchical config cascade
Native Windows (ConPTY) support
Default session name to the terminal title
Broadcast terminal title from session name
Add terminal.setTitle config flag
Invert priority order, accent on right, header color, true black theme
Session name, priority, and color metadata
Edit dialog for session settings with parent inheritance
Color accent on session items
Sort sessions by priority then status
Mobile key bar via right-to-left edge swipe

Mobile special-key bar component
